name: Chicken Fajitas
recipeIngredient: 1/2 teaspoon white pepper, or lemon pepper
4 red and green bell peppers, sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle salt, pepper, and garlic powder evenly over chicken.
2. Mix in lemon juice, vegetable oil, and wine vinegar until the chicken is completely coated.
3. Marinate for 1 hour.
4. Grill the chicken breast halves whole or slice them up and stir-fry.
5. Serve with roasted peppers and onions, salsa, and guacamole on warmed flour tortillas.
